channel.title: Learning Analytics on CEDIS
channel.description: Recent content in Learning Analytics on CEDIS

item.title: OctaAnalysis
item.description: Already available digital product by CEDIS/UnB to support the design, management, and analysis of gamified educational and collaborative experiences with integrated analytics.

item.title: Learning Analytics and Educational Management
item.description: An interdisciplinary area that combines data analysis, computer science, and educational psychology to enhance learning and educational environments. By collecting, analyzing, and interpreting data about learners and their contexts, it provides insights to personalize education, identify students who need more support, and improve educational outcomes.

item.title: OctaAnalysis Project
item.description: Ongoing CEDIS project focused on the research, design, validation, and continuous evolution of methods and infrastructures for gamification and learning analytics, with OctaAnalysis as its resulting product.

item.title: Products
item.description: The Undergraduate Analysis Model (MAGRA) enables the prediction of dropout rates in face-to-face undergraduate courses.

item.title: Products
item.description: The Academic Management Support System - SAGA is a tool developed to assist academic managers in monitoring indicators for undergraduate courses.

item.title: People
item.description: Full Professor at the University of Brasília (UnB), working in the undergraduate Software Engineering program and the Graduate Program in Applied Computing.

item.title: People
item.description: Professor at the University of Brasília (UnB), working in the Software Engineering undergraduate program on software quality, digital government, and software engineering education.

item.title: People
item.description: Master in Applied Computing, University of Brasília

item.title: OctaAnalysis platform expands CEDIS's portfolio of digital innovation
item.description: OctaAnalysis is a CEDIS platform focused on the design, management, and analytical monitoring of gamified experiences.

item.title: Article awarded Best Paper at ITHET 2024
item.description: Paper presented at IEEE ITHET 2024 in Paris receives Best Paper award.

item.title: CEDIS Professors Receive Honorable Mention
item.description: Contextus - An advanced AI, NLP, and ML platform at the heart of Scientific Analysis, led by CEDIS

item.title: CEDIS Researchers Launch Book
item.description: Book on Learning Indicators launched with the participation of CEDIS researchers.
